title: Security Scenarios
drDigitalIntro: You'll face realistic security scenarios: identifying phishing emails, recognizing suspicious websites, deciding whether to click links, handling scam text messages, and making safe shopping decisions. This tests your ability to apply security knowledge in real-world situations. Pass this assessment and you're ready to navigate the internet safely.
drDigitalSuccess: You're a security expert! Stay safe out there.
drDigitalHint: When in doubt, don't click. Ask for help if something feels wrong.
